otherMommyMovieOverview.title: Other Mommy Movie Overview
otherMommyMovieOverview.intro: Other Mommy is an upcoming supernatural horror film directed by Rob Savage and produced by Blumhouse Productions and Atomic Monster, with Universal Pictures handling distribution. It adapts Josh Malerman's 2024 horror novel Incidents Around the House and reaches North American theaters on October 9, 2026. Jessica Chastain stars in a dual role as both the mother Ursula and the sinister entity known as the Other Mommy.

items.title: Director
items.description: Rob Savage, known for atmospheric, screen-life, and slow-burn horror.

items.title: Lead Actor
items.description: Jessica Chastain plays a dual role as mother Ursula and the entity Other Mommy.

items.title: Release Date
items.description: Theatrical release in North America on October 9, 2026.

items.title: Studios
items.description: Produced by Blumhouse Productions and Atomic Monster; distributed by Universal Pictures.

items.title: Based On
items.description: The novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman, author of Bird Box.

items.title: Genre
items.description: Supernatural horror with domestic and psychological elements.

otherMommyPlotAndStory.title: Other Mommy Plot and Story
otherMommyPlotAndStory.intro: The story follows eight-year-old Bela, whose family is her entire world. But alongside her mother, her father (Daddo), and her grandmother, there is also the Other Mommy, a malevolent entity that has visited Bela for as long as she can remember and repeatedly asks to be let into her heart.

faqs.question: What is Other Mommy about?
faqs.answer: Other Mommy centers on eight-year-old Bela, who is visited nightly by a malevolent entity she calls Other Mommy. The entity repeatedly asks to enter Bela's heart, and its presence intensifies as cracks appear in her parents' marriage.

faqs.question: Who is Bela in Other Mommy?
faqs.answer: Bela is the young girl at the center of Other Mommy. The tale is told from her child's-eye perspective, which amplifies the dread as she tries to make sense of a threatening force only she can see.

faqs.question: What does the Other Mommy want?
faqs.answer: The Other Mommy's recurring demand is to be allowed into Bela's heart. This disturbing request is the engine of the story's tension and the source of Bela's nightly terror throughout Other Mommy.

faqs.question: How does the family fit into Other Mommy?
faqs.answer: In Other Mommy, the entity appears to feed on the emotional turmoil within Bela's household, particularly the marital troubles between her parents. As the family fractures, the Other Mommy grows stronger and more threatening.

faqs.question: What is the tone of Other Mommy?
faqs.answer: Other Mommy is a slow-burn domestic horror that blends supernatural dread with family drama, keeping the threat intimate and rooted in the home.

otherMommyCastAndCharacters.title: Other Mommy Cast and Characters
otherMommyCastAndCharacters.intro: Other Mommy assembles a cast led by Jessica Chastain in a dual role, supported by Jay Duplass and young actress Arabella Olivia Clark as Bela, alongside an ensemble of familiar character actors.

otherMommyEntity.title: Who Is the Other Mommy?
otherMommyEntity.intro: The Other Mommy is the malevolent entity that haunts Bela. It is not simply a ghost but a presence that seems to mirror and distort motherhood, growing in power alongside the family's emotional collapse.

faqs.question: What is the Other Mommy?
faqs.answer: The Other Mommy is a malevolent supernatural entity that visits Bela and wears the shape of a mother. It appears familiar yet deeply wrong, an uncanny double of maternal care.

faqs.question: What does the Other Mommy want?
faqs.answer: The Other Mommy's repeated request is to enter Bela's heart, a disturbing demand that drives the story's central fear and escalation.

faqs.question: Why does the Other Mommy target Bela?
faqs.answer: The Other Mommy is drawn to the chaos and sadness in Bela's life, particularly the turmoil in her parents' marriage, and grows stronger as that turmoil deepens.

faqs.question: How does the Other Mommy behave?
faqs.answer: The Other Mommy has visited Bela nightly for as long as she can remember. It can seem friendly at times, but its face moves and shifts in unsettling ways, signaling its true nature.

faqs.question: Is the Other Mommy connected to the family?
faqs.answer: The Other Mommy appears to feed on the family's fractures, making the domestic drama inseparable from the supernatural threat at the heart of the film.

otherMommyProduction.title: Other Mommy Production
otherMommyProduction.intro: Other Mommy is a collaboration between two of the biggest names in modern horror. The adaptation brings Josh Malerman's literary terror into Blumhouse's blockbuster horror pipeline.

items.title: Director: Rob Savage
items.description: Rob Savage directs Other Mommy, bringing his reputation for tense, innovative horror filmmaking to the project.

items.title: Blumhouse Productions
items.description: Jason Blum's Blumhouse produces Other Mommy, the studio behind a long string of commercially successful horror hits.

items.title: Atomic Monster
items.description: Atomic Monster co-produces Other Mommy, James Wan's horror-focused production company, partnering with Blumhouse.

items.title: Universal Pictures
items.description: Universal Pictures handles worldwide theatrical distribution for Other Mommy, giving the film a wide studio release.

items.title: Based on the Novel
items.description: The Other Mommy screenplay adapts Incidents Around the House, Josh Malerman's acclaimed 2024 horror novel.

items.title: Author Connection
items.description: Josh Malerman, the author behind Other Mommy's source novel, is best known for Bird Box, which was also adapted into a major film.

otherMommyTrailerAndMedia.title: Other Mommy Trailer and Media
otherMommyTrailerAndMedia.intro: Marketing for Other Mommy has begun building anticipation ahead of its October 2026 release, with the official trailer giving audiences their first sustained look at the film's terrifying tone.

items.title: Official Trailer
items.description: The official Other Mommy trailer has been released, showcasing Jessica Chastain's dual role and the film's unsettling domestic horror.

items.title: Trailer Debut
items.description: The Other Mommy trailer was reported to be attached to theatrical screenings of The Odyssey, reaching a wide audience in cinemas.

items.title: Audience Reaction
items.description: Early reports described the Other Mommy trailer as genuinely frightening, with accounts of jump scares startling theater audiences.

items.title: First Look
items.description: Promotional materials for Other Mommy highlight the eerie maternal imagery and Bela's child's-eye perspective on the terror.

items.title: Marketing Tone
items.description: The Other Mommy campaign emphasizes slow-burn dread and the uncanny presence of the Other Mommy rather than gore.

otherMommyBook.title: Other Mommy Source Novel: Incidents Around the House
otherMommyBook.intro: Before it was a film, Other Mommy was Incidents Around the House, a chilling horror novel by Josh Malerman told entirely from the perspective of a child. The book established the entity, the family, and the dread that the adaptation brings to the screen.

items.title: Author: Josh Malerman
items.description: The Other Mommy source novel was written by Josh Malerman, the bestselling horror author best known for Bird Box.

items.title: Point of View
items.description: The novel behind Other Mommy is told entirely from eight-year-old Bela's perspective, heightening the fear through a child's limited understanding.

items.title: The Entity
items.description: The book establishes the Other Mommy as a presence that has visited Bela nightly, asking to enter her heart.

items.title: Family Dynamics
items.description: The Other Mommy novel ties the supernatural threat to the emotional fractures in Bela's family, especially her parents' troubled marriage.

items.title: Reception
items.description: The novel that inspired Other Mommy received strong reviews from horror readers and was praised for its original, child-focused narration.

items.title: Adaptation
items.description: The Other Mommy film adapts the novel's core premise and characters for the screen under Rob Savage's direction.

otherMommyReleaseAndReviews.title: Other Mommy Release and Reviews
otherMommyReleaseAndReviews.intro: Other Mommy moves from a celebrated horror novel to a major studio theatrical release. Below are the key milestones in its journey to the big screen.

milestones.title: Novel Published
milestones.description: Josh Malerman's Incidents Around the House is published, introducing Bela and the Other Mommy to readers.

milestones.title: Film Adaptation Announced
milestones.description: An Other Mommy adaptation enters development with Blumhouse and Atomic Monster producing.

milestones.title: Rob Savage Directs
milestones.description: Rob Savage is attached to direct Other Mommy, with Jessica Chastain set to lead the cast in a dual role.

milestones.title: Official Trailer Released
milestones.description: The first official Other Mommy trailer debuts, attached to theatrical screenings of The Odyssey.

milestones.title: Theatrical Release
milestones.description: Other Mommy arrives in North American theaters, distributed by Universal Pictures.

questions.question: What is Other Mommy about?
questions.answer: Other Mommy is a 2026 supernatural horror film about eight-year-old Bela, who is visited nightly by a malevolent entity called the Other Mommy that demands to enter her heart.

questions.question: When does Other Mommy come out?
questions.answer: Other Mommy is scheduled for a theatrical release in North America on October 9, 2026, distributed by Universal Pictures.

questions.question: Who stars in Other Mommy?
questions.answer: Other Mommy stars Jessica Chastain in a dual role as Bela's mother Ursula and the entity Other Mommy, alongside Jay Duplass and Arabella Olivia Clark as Bela.

questions.question: Who directs Other Mommy?
questions.answer: Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage and produced by Blumhouse Productions and Atomic Monster.

questions.question: What book is Other Mommy based on?
questions.answer: Other Mommy is adapted from Incidents Around the House, the 2024 horror novel by Josh Malerman, author of Bird Box.

questions.question: Where can I watch the Other Mommy trailer?
questions.answer: The official Other Mommy trailer has been released and can be found on YouTube, having debuted attached to theatrical screenings of The Odyssey.
